items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• Do you understand Spanish?
• 2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French
• 5- Do you want to go to the movies today? / park / downtown
• 2- Do you __________________________________________________________________
• 4- I understand Spanish

items.prompt: 6- Do you drink coffee and milk for breakfast? coffee – juice / tea – juice
items.answer: 5- Do you want to go to the movies today? / park / downtown

items.text: 2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French
5- Do you want to go to the movies today? / park / downtown
